overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rural farmstead on an overcast day. The character traverses from a fenced vegetable garden through a farmyard with wooden barns and equipment, then onto a dirt road leading into open countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced vegetable garden with corn crops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the vegetable garden between wooden fences toward a gate

entered.detail: tall green corn stalks growing in rows along the left side of the path
leafy green vegetables growing in the dirt center of the garden path
weathered wooden picket fence lining both sides of the garden path
wooden gate structure at the end of the garden path leading to the farmyard
small gray wooden outbuilding visible beyond the garden fence

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow fenced garden area with tall corn plants on the left and leafy vegetables growing in the center. Wooden fences line both sides of the dirt path, and a wooden gate is visible ahead leading out of the garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmyard with large barn and equipment

events.description: passes through wooden gate from enclosed garden into open farmyard
continues walking past an NPC farmer working near the barn entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the farmyard passing by a large barn and an NPC worker

notable_agents.action: farmer NPC walking near the barn entrance, appearing to carry tools or supplies

entered.detail: two-story weathered wooden barn with gabled roof and large doors
tall thin metal chimney extending behind the barn
old-fashioned wooden cart with large spoked wheels

segments.scene_description: Passing through the gate into an open farmyard, the character approaches a large weathered wooden barn with a tall smokestack behind it. An NPC farmer is visible near the barn entrance, and a wooden wagon sits to the right side of the yard.

scene_state.functional_zone: farm equipment storage and transition area

events.description: slight turn to the right while walking past stacked barrels and farm wagons

agents.ego_description: walking past farm equipment and storage barrels toward the edge of the farm property

entered.detail: wooden barrels stacked on pallets along the right side of the path
old wooden wagon with green canvas cover
small shed with metal roof and wooden walls

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the farmyard past stacks of wooden barrels and old wagons. The large barn recedes behind as the character approaches the perimeter of the farm property, passing various storage sheds and equipment.

events.description: turns left at the dirt road junction onto the main rural road
passes an oil pumpjack structure on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: turning left at the junction and continuing along the dirt road into open countryside

entered.detail: tall wooden oil pump structure with moving beam arm
two-story white wooden house with porch visible in the distance
open grassy field stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: At a rural junction, the character turns left onto a wider dirt road. An oil derrick pumpjack stands prominently on the left, while open prairie stretches to the right. A white wooden farmhouse appears in the distance on the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road with scattered farmhouses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt road away from the farm into the open countryside

entered.detail: split-rail wooden fence lining the right side of the road
wooden telephone pole with wires running along the road

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the dirt road flanked by wooden fences and grassy fields. The farmhouse remains visible on the left while the landscape opens up into rolling countryside with utility poles lining the road ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed intimacy of a vegetable garden into the expansive openness of a rural farmyard. It begins by tracking the character through a narrow dirt path flanked by tall corn plants and leafy greens, moving steadily toward a wooden gate. As the character passes through the gate, the scene opens into a wide yard featuring a weathered wooden barn with a tall smokestack and a farmer standing nearby. The camera then continues forward, gliding past a wooden wagon and stacks of barrels as the barn recedes into the background. Finally, the view expands further across the farm property, passing various storage sheds and equipment as the character moves toward the perimeter of the estate.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rural junction into an expansive, open countryside. It begins as the character turns left onto a wide dirt road, passing a prominent oil derrick pumpjack on the left while the prairie stretches out to the right. As the character proceeds, a white wooden farmhouse emerges in the distance, anchoring the left side of the frame. The scene then expands as the road is flanked by wooden fences and grassy fields, with the landscape opening further into rolling hills. Finally, the camera moves forward along the path, following a line of utility poles that lead deeper into the rural horizon.
